# Notifications

Define what you want to be notified about and how

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/notifications/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Notifications](https://developers.cloudflare.com/notifications/index.md): Configure alerts for your Cloudflare account.

## Configure Cloudflare Notifications

- [Configure Cloudflare Notifications](https://developers.cloudflare.com/notifications/get-started/index.md): Set up notifications via email, webhooks, or PagerDuty.
- [Configure PagerDuty](https://developers.cloudflare.com/notifications/get-started/configure-pagerduty/index.md): Route Cloudflare notifications to PagerDuty.
- [Configure webhooks](https://developers.cloudflare.com/notifications/get-started/configure-webhooks/index.md): Send notifications to webhook endpoints.

## Available Notifications

- [Available Notifications](https://developers.cloudflare.com/notifications/notification-available/index.md): Browse available notification types by product.

## Notification History

- [Notification History](https://developers.cloudflare.com/notifications/notification-history/index.md): View a log of sent notifications.

## API reference

- [API reference](https://developers.cloudflare.com/api/resources/alerting/subresources/available_alerts/methods/list/index.md): Access the API reference documentation.

## reference

- [Common errors](https://developers.cloudflare.com/notifications/reference/common-errors/index.md): Troubleshoot common notification configuration errors.
- [HTTP Traffic Alerts](https://developers.cloudflare.com/notifications/reference/traffic-alerts/index.md): Monitor origin and edge HTTP error rates.
- [Webhook payload schema](https://developers.cloudflare.com/notifications/reference/webhook-payload-schema/index.md): Review the JSON payload structure for webhooks.
